stemHtml: Under Regulation (EU) 376/2014, when an EASA-certified or approved organisation identifies an actual or potential safety risk through analysis of reportable occurrences, within what timeframe must it share that information with the Agency?

options.a: Within 30 days of the date of notification by the reporter.
options.b: As soon as possible after the report is received.
options.c: No later than 14 days from the date of notification by the reporter.
options.d: At the next scheduled safety forum.
